glosses.ja: 表現; プリントアウト

sentences.target: Dein Ausdruck wirkt heute irgendwie traurig.

translations.de: Dein Ausdruck wirkt heute irgendwie traurig.
translations.en: Your expression looks kind of sad today.
translations.es: Hoy tu expresión se ve un poco triste.
translations.fr: Tu as l'air un peu triste aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi hai un'espressione un po' triste.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天的表情有点难过。
translations.yue: 你今日個樣有啲唔開心。
translations.ru: У тебя сегодня какое-то грустное выражение лица.
translations.pt: Hoje você está com uma expressão meio triste.
translations.he: ההבעה שלך נראית היום קצת עצובה.
translations.tr: Bugün yüz ifaden biraz üzgün görünüyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nét mặt bạn trông hơi buồn.
translations.ar: تبدو ملامحك اليوم حزينة بعض الشيء.
translations.nl: Je ziet er vandaag een beetje verdrietig uit.
translations.uk: У тебе сьогодні якийсь сумний вираз обличчя.
translations.hu: Ma valahogy szomorúnak tűnik az arckifejezésed.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हारा चेहरा थोड़ा उदास लग रहा है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η έκφρασή σου φαίνεται κάπως λυπημένη.
translations.nb: Du ser litt trist ut i dag.
translations.id: Ekspresi wajahmu hari ini terlihat agak sedih.
translations.sv: Du ser lite ledsen ut i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi ai o expresie cam tristă.
translations.cs: Dnes máš tak nějak smutný výraz.
translations.da: Du ser lidt trist ud i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は表情がちょっと悲しそうだね。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'Ausdruck'; 2nd person singular; agrees with masculine singular nominative head.
Masculine noun, singular, nominative; subject of 'wirkt'. Here likely the facial/overall expression.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; links the subject with the predicative adjective 'traurig' (appears/seems).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Modal/degree adverb modifying the predicate (nuances the manner/degree of 'traurig').
Predicative adjective complement licensed by 'wirkt'; describes the subject’s state; uninflected in predicative use.

sentences.target: Ich brauche den Ausdruck für morgen.

translations.de: Ich brauche den Ausdruck für morgen.
translations.en: I need the printout for tomorrow.
translations.es: Necesito el documento impreso para mañana.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin de la version imprimée pour demain.
translations.it: Mi serve la stampa per domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要明天用的打印件。
translations.yue: 我需要份聽日用嘅打印件。
translations.pt: Preciso da versão impressa para amanhã.
translations.he: אני צריך את העותק המודפס למחר.
translations.vi: Tôi cần bản in cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik heb de print voor morgen nodig.
translations.hi: मुझे कल के लिए प्रिंटआउट चाहिए.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger utskriften til i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag behöver utskriften till i morgon.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de varianta tipărită pentru mâine.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for udskriften til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日までに印刷物が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of 'brauche'.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; selects a direct object.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, singular, accusative; direct object of 'brauche'. In this context likely ‘printout’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a temporal PP ('für morgen').
Temporal noun used without article as complement of 'für'; accusative by prepositional government.

sentences.target: Dieser Ausdruck passt hier am besten.

translations.de: Dieser Ausdruck passt hier am besten.
translations.fr: Cette expression convient le mieux ici.
translations.it: Questa espressione è la più adatta qui.
translations.ko: 여기에는 이 표현이 가장 잘 맞아.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里用这个表达最合适。
translations.ru: Здесь больше всего подходит это выражение.
translations.pt: Esta expressão é a que melhor se encaixa aqui.
translations.tr: Buraya en çok bu ifade uyar.
translations.vi: Cách diễn đạt này hợp nhất ở đây.
translations.nl: Deze uitdrukking past hier het beste.
translations.hu: Ide ez a kifejezés illik a legjobban.
translations.hi: यह अभिव्यक्ति यहाँ सबसे उपयुक्त है.
translations.el: Αυτή η έκφραση είναι η πιο κατάλληλη εδώ.
translations.id: Ungkapan ini paling pas di sini.
translations.sv: Det här uttrycket passar bäst här.
translations.ro: Această expresie se potrivește cel mai bine aici.
translations.cs: Tento výraz se sem hodí nejlépe.
translations.ja: ここはこの表現がいちばん合います。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine nominative singular; modifies 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, singular, nominative; subject of 'passt'.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular present; ‘to fit/suit’.
Locative adverb modifying 'passt'.
Fixed superlative marker (historically ‘an dem’) in the periphrastic adverbial superlative construction 'am + Superlative'.
Superlative form used adverbially with 'am' (‘am besten’) modifying 'passt'.

sentences.target: Mit diesem Ausdruck meint sie etwas anderes.
sentences.reading: /mɪt ˈdiːzəm ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk maɪ̯nt ziː ˈɛtvas ˈandəʁəs/

translations.de: Mit diesem Ausdruck meint sie etwas anderes.
translations.ipa: /mɪt ˈdiːzəm ˈaʊ̯sdʁʊk maɪ̯nt ziː ˈɛtvas ˈandəʁəs/
translations.en: With this expression she means something else.
translations.es: Con esta expresión quiere decir otra cosa.
translations.fr: Par cette expression, elle veut dire autre chose.
translations.it: Con questa espressione intende un'altra cosa.
translations.ko: 이 표현으로 그녀는 다른 뜻을 말하는 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 她用这个表达指的是别的意思。
translations.yue: 佢用呢個講法係指第二樣嘢。
translations.ru: Под этим выражением она имеет в виду другое.
translations.pt: Com essa expressão, ela quer dizer outra coisa.
translations.he: עם הביטוי הזה היא מתכוונת למשהו אחר.
translations.tr: Bu ifadeyle başka bir şeyi kastediyor.
translations.vi: Với cách diễn đạt này, cô ấy muốn nói điều khác.
translations.nl: Met deze uitdrukking bedoelt ze iets anders.
translations.uk: Під цим виразом вона має на увазі інше.
translations.hi: इस अभिव्यक्ति से वह कुछ और कहना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Przez to wyrażenie ma na myśli coś innego.
translations.el: Με αυτήν την έκφραση εννοεί κάτι άλλο.
translations.nb: Med dette uttrykket mener hun noe annet.
translations.id: Dengan ungkapan ini, yang dia maksud adalah hal lain.
translations.sv: Med det här uttrycket menar hon något annat.
translations.ro: Prin această expresie, ea se referă la altceva.
translations.cs: Tímto výrazem má na mysli něco jiného.
translations.da: Med dette udtryk mener hun noget andet.
translations.fi: Tällä ilmauksella hän tarkoittaa jotain muuta.
translations.ja: この表現で彼女は別のことを言っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative/instrumental PP.
Demonstrative determiner, dative masculine singular; modifies 'Ausdruck'.
Masculine noun, singular, dative; object of preposition 'mit'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object phrase expressing intended meaning.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject of 'meint'.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as head of the object phrase; accusative.
Adjective used substantivally, neuter accusative singular, agreeing with 'etwas' to mean ‘something else/different’.

jp: Dein Ausdruck wirkt heute irgendwie traurig.
Ich brauche den Ausdruck für morgen.
Dieser Ausdruck passt hier am besten.
Mit diesem Ausdruck meint sie etwas anderes.

I need the printout for tomorrow.

इस अभिव्यक्ति से वह कुछ और कहना चाहती है.
